items.text: Initial Diagnosis: Self-diagnosis performed after the EPS warning light comes on with the ignition in ON mode and before the engine is started and the EPS warning light goes out.
Continuous diagnostics: Self-diagnostics that continue from the time the EPS warning light goes off until the ignition is turned to the OFF (LOCK) mode.
When performing diagnostics, be sure to check the "Troubleshooting Procedure" and follow the troubleshooting procedure.
When conducting test drives, the driver must comply with all laws and regulations, observe good manners, and drive in accordance with the surrounding conditions.
